debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
γ : Type u_3
inst✝ : TopologicalSpace α
x : α
p p' q q' : α → Prop
hT : {x | p x} ∈ nhds x
hT' : {x | p' x} ∈ nhds x
hS : {x | q x} ∈ nhds x
hS' : {x | q' x} ∈ nhds x
⊢ {x | p x ∧ q x ∨ p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ nhds x

proof:
filter_upwards [hT, hT', hS, hS'] with y hp hp' hq hq' using
    Or.inl ⟨hp, hq⟩
failed_attempts:
have h1 : {x | p x ∧ q x} ∈ 𝓝 x := inter_mem hT hS
  have h2 : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := inter_mem hT' hS'
  exact union_mem h1 h2

have h1 : {x | p x ∧ q x} ∈ 𝓝 x := inter_mem hT hS
  have h2 : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := inter_mem hT' hS'
  have : {x | (p x ∧ q x) ∨ (p' x ∧ q' x)} ∈ 𝓝 x := union_mem h1 h2
  simpa [Set.setOf_or] using this

have h1 : {x | p x ∧ q x} ∈ 𝓝 x := inter_mem hT hS
  have h2 : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := inter_mem hT' hS'
  have : {x | (p x ∧ q x) ∨ (p' x ∧ q' x)} ∈ 𝓝 x := union_mem h1 h2
  simpa [and_assoc, and_left_comm, and_comm, or_left_comm, or_assoc, or_comm] using this

have h1 : {x | p x ∧ q x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    exact inter_mem hT hS
  have h2 : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    exact inter_mem hT' hS'
  refine (nhds x).sets_of_superset (union_mem h1 h2) ?_
  intro y hy
  rcases hy with hy | hy
  · exact Or.inl hy
  · exact Or.inr hy

have h1 : {x | p x ∧ q x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    exact inter_mem hT hS
  have h2 : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    exact inter_mem hT' hS'
  have hU : {x | (p x ∧ q x) ∨ (p' x ∧ q' x)} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    exact union_mem h1 h2
  simpa [setOf_or, setOf_and] using hU

have hpq : {x | p x ∧ q x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    exact inter_mem hT hS
  have hp'q' : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    exact inter_mem hT' hS'
  have hsubset :
      {x | p x ∧ q x} ∪ {x | p' x ∧ q' x} ⊆ {x | p x ∧ q x ∨ p' x ∧ q' x} := by
    intro y hy
    rcases hy with hy | hy
    · exact Or.inl hy
    · exact Or.inr hy
  exact mem_of_superset (union_mem hpq hp'q') hsubset

have h₁ : {x | p x ∧ q x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    exact inter_mem hT hS
  have h₂ : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    exact inter_mem hT' hS'
  exact union_mem h₁ h₂

have h1 : {x | p x ∧ q x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by

  have h2 : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    exact inter_mem hT' hS'
  have hU : {x | (p x ∧ q x) ∨ (p' x ∧ q' x)} ∈ 𝓝 x := by

  have h₂ : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by

  have hU : {x | (p x ∧ q x) ∨ (p' x ∧ q' x)} ∈ 𝓝 x := by

    exact ⟨hp, hq⟩
  have h2 : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by

  have h2 : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by

  have h : {x | (p x ∧ q x) ∨ (p' x ∧ q' x)} ∈ 𝓝 x := union_mem h1 h2

    simpa [and_left_comm, and_assoc, and_comm] using (inter_mem hT hS)
  have h2 : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    simpa [and_left_comm, and_assoc, and_comm] using (inter_mem hT' hS')
  simpa [or_and_left, or_and_right] using (union_mem h1 h2)

  have h2 : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by

have h₁ : {x | p x ∧ q x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by

    exact ⟨hyT, hyS⟩
  have h₂ : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    filter_upwards [hT', hS'] with y hyT hyS
    exact ⟨hyT, hyS⟩
  have h : {x | (p x ∧ q x) ∨ (p' x ∧ q' x)} ∈ 𝓝 x := by

  have h2 : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    exact inter_mem hT' hS'
  have h3 : {x | p x ∧ q x} ⊆ {x | p x ∧ q x ∨ p' x ∧ q' x} := by
    intro y hy
    exact Or.inl hy
  have h4 : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} ⊆ {x | p x ∧ q x ∨ p' x ∧ q' x} := by
    intro y hy
    exact Or.inr hy
  exact (nhds x).sets_of_superset (union_mem h1 h2) (by

    rcases hy with hy | hy
    · exact h3 hy
    · exact h4 hy)

successful_attempts:
filter_upwards [hT, hT', hS, hS'] with y hp hp' hq hq' using
    Or.inl ⟨hp, hq⟩

filter_upwards [hT, hS] with y hyT hyS
  exact Or.inl ⟨hyT, hyS⟩

filter_upwards [hT, hS] with x hxT hxS
  exact Or.inl ⟨hxT, hxS⟩
